reviewer: weekly-hardening-routine (headless Chromium 141 via CDP; no chrome-devtools-mcp in cloud env)

spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates zoom participating in layout with transition: zoom — the exact css-viewport/CSSWG animatable-zoom contract — and contrasts it with transform: scale in the note box scenario.

interactive.rationale: Re-reviewed after the 2026-06-04 generic-probe removal: the scenario switcher swaps the rendered stage (verified: card grid / note box / case 4 each changed the live region), and hovering a card drives real computed zoom 1 -> 1.08.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card copy matches the hover-reflow behaviour the page shows.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers scale-vs-zoom comparison but not reduced-motion behaviour or zoom on nested zoomed ancestors.

references.rationale: Canonical ChromeStatus 5183671737909248 link restored 2026-07-19 (page previously cited the Chrome 128 Standardized CSS zoom entry, kept as a labelled secondary reference).

conformance.rationale: Feature-level suite exists; not re-run as part of this targeted re-review.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Scripted CDP session: scenario buttons clicked with live-region text changes recorded, hover zoom read from getComputedStyle, full-page screenshots before/after inspected, no page errors (only the sandbox-blocked Google Fonts request).

telemetry_health.rationale: No unexpected errors observed in review; page asserts not audited in depth.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables; readable stage in the screenshots.

accessibility.rationale: Scenario buttons are real buttons and the summary is a live region, but the buttons do not expose aria-pressed selection state.

openQuestions.title: Expose selected-scenario state on the switcher buttons
openQuestions.detail: The scenario buttons visually indicate selection but expose no aria-pressed/aria-current, so the selected scenario is not announced. Add pressed state (and re-check focus visibility) next time this page is touched.

summary: Re-review after the 2026-06-04 removal of the unrelated generic probe panel: the page is not static. The scenario switcher changes the rendered example and live summary, and hover drives real computed zoom (1 -> 1.08) in layout flow. The 2026-06-04 open question is closed; one minor a11y follow-up recorded.
